parameters.query: SELECT id, address, status, total_budget, total_spent, ROUND(CASE WHEN total_budget>0 THEN total_spent::numeric / total_budget * 100 ELSE 0 END) AS pct FROM properties WHERE status NOT IN ('sold') ORDER BY status, address;

SELECT j.id, j.title, j.due_date, c.company_name, p.address FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN contractors c ON c.id = j.contractor_id LEFT JOIN properties p ON p.id = j.property_id WHERE j.due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND j.status NOT IN ('paid','complete') ORDER BY j.due_date ASC;

SELECT i.id, i.amount, i.invoice_number, c.company_name, j.title FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN contractors c ON c.id = i.contractor_id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON j.id = i.job_id WHERE i.status = 'pending' ORDER BY i.submitted_at DESC;
